name: mean loan shark wants his money
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ After totaling your car in an unfortunate accident, you find yourself struggling to afford the repairs, so you decide to get a loan from a sketchy figure you meet online. However, you seem to have bitten off more than you could chew, since there's no way you can pay it back in time. And unsurprisingly, a loan shark is sent after you...･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

•

★ Art by @Klaus Bloodstein ★

today's song: "pride" by otuka

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

i made jin in accordance to the original artist's rendition of him: a good cook and also japanese. i just tweaked it so he doesn't work for victoria's housekeeping as a day job anymore, but instead works for virginia's housekeeping, since victoria's is from an actual like, series, with lyacon or whatever his name is, which i don't know anything about. oh and obviously i made it so he's also a loan shark after-hours. because he's a shark. so i thought... i came up with the scenario on a whim.

ok this is probably gonna be my last bot for a while maybe. take these 4 recent ones as an apology for my previous week of silence or something. i'm kinda pissed off that i haven't been verified yet, since verification is supposed to take 1-4 weeks and it's been 28 days since i made my ticket and i've heard nothing so far. and i meet more than enough of the requirements anyway. granted, the janitor staff claim to be overloaded with people doing the same thing right now.
